name: instant-api — ops rollup
description: Single-pane ops view rolling up the 5 surface-specific dashboards (admin, promote, billing, lifecycle, deploy). Curated billboards + sparklines for the on-call rotation. For deep dives, jump into the dedicated dashboard for each surface. Source: same Log/Transaction/audit_log feeds as the underlying dashboards.

pages.name: Rollup
pages.description: Top-level health for everything shipped this week

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) AS 'err %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND kind = 'admin.access' SINCE 24 hours ago COMPARE WITH 1 day ago

SELECT filter(uniqueCount(approval_token), WHERE kind = 'promote.approval_requested') - filter(uniqueCount(approval_token), WHERE kind IN ('promote.approved', 'promote.rejected')) AS 'pending' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND kind IN ('promote.approval_requested', 'promote.approved', 'promote.rejected') SINCE 24 hours ago

SELECT filter(uniqueCount(deploy_id), WHERE kind = 'deploy.created') - filter(uniqueCount(deploy_id), WHERE kind IN ('deploy.healthy', 'deploy.failed')) AS 'in-flight' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND kind IN ('deploy.created', 'deploy.healthy', 'deploy.failed') SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT filter(count(*), WHERE kind = 'payment.grace_started') AS 'started', filter(count(*), WHERE kind = 'payment.grace_reminder') AS 'reminder', filter(count(*), WHERE kind = 'payment.grace_recovered') AS 'recovered', filter(count(*), WHERE kind = 'payment.grace_terminated') AS 'terminated' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND kind LIKE 'payment.grace_%' SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND kind IN ('deploy.created', 'deploy.healthy', 'deploy.failed') FACET kind TIMESERIES AUTO SINCE 24 hours ago

SELECT (filter(count(*), WHERE name = 'POST /api/v1/billing/checkout') / filter(count(*), WHERE name = 'GET /pricing')) * 100 AS 'conv %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND name IN ('GET /pricing', 'POST /api/v1/billing/checkout') SINCE 7 days ago

SELECT filter(uniqueCount(resource_id), WHERE kind = 'resource.paused') - filter(uniqueCount(resource_id), WHERE kind = 'resource.resumed') AS 'paused' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND kind IN ('resource.paused', 'resource.resumed') SINCE 30 days ago
SELECT percentile(deploy_ready_seconds, 50) AS 'p50 s' FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND kind = 'deploy.healthy' AND deploy_ready_seconds IS NOT NULL SINCE 24 hours ago
